description: Now separated from S.H.I.E.L.D., Bobbi and Hunter sit together at a bar, pondering their uncertain future. Drinks arrive anonymously, and they see Simmons, Fitz, Mack, Daisy, and May subtly present nearby, offering a silent, heartfelt goodbye to their friends. It's a moving, wordless farewell among the found family of S.H.I.E.L.D.

transcript.line: Always loved the name, but I once had a bad run-in there with a Nigerian drug dealer, so... Maybe Bora Bora?
I don't know. Think it'll be a long time before anybody in the intelligence business trusts us.
I'm afraid they never will, luv. Should get the check.
I know. You've got an admirer.
They asked me not to say.
Oh, that's Jemma. Why doesn't she...? She can't, can she.
